user.description: Set up Apollo mmWave. On first setup an 'Apollo mmWave' dashboard is added to your sidebar with a tuning + zone-mapping tab for each detected Apollo mmWave device. You can turn this off in the integration options, or hide the dashboard from your profile later.

data_description.auto_create_view: Registers an 'Apollo mmWave' dashboard in your sidebar with a tab per device. Turn this off if you prefer to lay out the cards yourself; the cards and strategy are still available to add manually.
